protocol_corrections.note: Feature 14 verifier returned 0 findings as expected (audit was spec-only). Per audit Analytics is PLANNED; the implementation is Wave 5. Closer for feature 14 deferred until Wave 5 phases land — empty findings is not the close condition for this feature.

Runbook proposes cross-feature executor parallelism with file-domain tracking. Practical constraint: all executors push to v1-rebuild; concurrent pushes race. Decision: run executors strictly serially across all features. CCWs still parallel with verifiers (CCW commits already settled before Wave 1 began).
